scripts.deploy: npm run build:icons && npm run build:css && wrangler deploy
scripts.db:migrate:local:all: wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --local --file=prisma/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --local --file=prisma/migrations/0002_rate_limit.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --local --file=prisma/migrations/0003_project_quota.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --local --file=prisma/migrations/0004_skill_map_and_daily.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --local --file=prisma/migrations/0005_token_limit_and_skill_version.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote:all: wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --remote --file=prisma/migrations/0002_rate_limit.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --remote --file=prisma/migrations/0003_project_quota.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --remote --file=prisma/migrations/0004_skill_map_and_daily.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --remote --file=prisma/migrations/0005_token_limit_and_skill_version.sql
scripts.db:migrate:global-secrets: wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --remote --file=prisma/migrations/0006_global_secrets.sql && wrangler d1 execute antvillagemgr --remote --file=prisma/migrations/set_system_admin.sql
